# IKE Starter Set

> IkeFoundation starter set: the ledger-form content set for Ike.
> The source is an append-only version ledger (declared stamps, birth-FQN
> identity); building replays the ledger; the released artifact is a change set.
> Generated by ike:starter-set-create; the SOP is the dev-knowledge-set-sop
> topic family in ike-lab-documents.

## Starter Set

- [IKE Starter Set](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/index.html.md)
- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/dependencies.html.md)
- [Built With](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/built-with.html.md)

## Other

- [Licenses (SPDX)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/licenses.html.md)

- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/plugin-management.html.md)
